filesModified.purpose: Add min-height: min(700px, 100vh) and flex column justify-end to .event-hero-inner
Replace large top padding with pt-[var(--header-height)] on content layer div
Mirror same padding change from TSX for TSX/PHP sync

warnings: Pre-existing ESLint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in EventHero.tsx and other blocks (not introduced by this change)

syncStatus.notes: Root wrapper mismatch warning is a known false positive (TSX uses Fragment+InspectorControls, PHP renders section directly)

testPage.notes: No block markup changes — CSS-only layout change, test page content unchanged

fixesApplied.change: Added .event-hero-inner rule: min-height: min(700px, 100vh); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end;
Content layer div: replaced pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+180px)] sm:pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+280px)] with pt-[var(--header-height)]
Content layer div: replaced pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+180px)] sm:pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+280px)] with pt-[var(--header-height)]
